message:
test(fuzz,bd-d3eci): add round-trip harness for robot CliError JSON envelope

cass produces structured robot-mode JSON envelopes (CliError-shaped:
code/kind/message/hint/retryable, plus result envelopes via
serde_json::to_string_pretty across ~6 sites in src/lib.rs). The
al19b/jyn5r golden test pins the kebab-case `kind` invariant for 81
known kinds, but no coverage-guided harness verifies that
parse(serialize(envelope)) == envelope for arbitrary inputs. That
round-trip is the contract every agent harness depends on — a
regression that introduces a non-serializable field or schema
mismatch would slip past the goldens (which only cover specific
known shapes).

This adds fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_robot_envelope_roundtrip.rs (Round-
Trip archetype, Pattern 2 from /testing-fuzzing). EnvelopeInput is
Arbitrary-derived from libfuzzer bytes, fields are bounded to 64KB
each, then the envelope is serialized via both compact and
pretty-printed serde_json paths and re-parsed. Asserts byte-equality
of the serialized text after the round-trip — any divergence
indicates a schema-stability regression.

Seed corpus has 3 entries: empty {}, minimal-success envelope, and
realistic missing-db error envelope with a hint string.

Acceptance from bead met:
- fuzz_targets/fuzz_robot_envelope_roundtrip.rs added
- Registered as [[bin]] in fuzz/Cargo.toml
- Seed corpus under fuzz/corpus/fuzz_robot_envelope_roundtrip/
- Pattern follows existing fuzz_time_parser (verified to build
  cleanly under cargo +nightly fuzz build per bd-4znjn)

Closes coding_agent_session_search-d3eci.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -98,3 +98,17 @@ path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_time_parser.rs"
 test = false

+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_query_transpiler"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_query_transpiler.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_robot_envelope_roundtrip"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_robot_envelope_roundtrip.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
